title: Social Service Mission and Vision
content:
Social Service Mission and Vision

Mission

To educate professionals equipped with the knowledge, skills, and values of social work, grounded in an approach that prioritizes human rights, social justice, and equality, while remaining sensitive to human and societal issues and adhering to ethical principles. The mission is to generate scientific knowledge aimed at achieving a more just, inclusive, prosperous, and sustainable society.

Vision

To foster competent social work professionals who integrate the applied and scientific dimensions of social work, uphold ethical principles, and work toward a society where individuals, families, and communities are empowered, inequalities are reduced, human rights are protected, and social justice is established. Additionally, to serve as a pioneering department that contributes to social change and development through practice-oriented scientific research.
